---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to scanning, scoring, reporting, or distribution
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

Describe the workflow problem you are trying to solve.

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you want to see in `graveyard`.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any existing flags, config options, or external tools you evaluated.

## Scope notes

Call out whether the request affects CLI UX, parsers, scoring, output formats, CI, or packaging. If the request overlaps with future-scope items in the PRD, note that explicitly.

## Additional context

Add examples, repository snippets, or links that help explain the request.
